institution.name: Franciscan Missionaries of Our Lady University

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Franciscan Missionaries of Our Lady University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.9k → $18.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Franciscan Missionaries of Our Lady University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.9k → $18.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Franciscan Missionaries of Our Lady University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (78.6% → 63.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Franciscan Missionaries of Our Lady University rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.5k → $27.7k).
